name: car-rental-optimizer
description: macOS desktop app prototype for comparing eHi and CAR Inc. rental options by total pickup cost.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:web -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
